message:
feat: add --long flag to bd show for full-detail output (bd-unav)

Adds --long flag matching the existing pattern from bd list. When set,
shows all available fields that the default output omits: extended
timestamps, closure details, compaction info, agent identity, gate
fields, slot/holder, source tracing, HOP fields, bonded-from refs,
and event fields. Only sections with data are rendered.

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -204,6 +204,9 @@ bd dep tree <id>
 
 # Get issue details (supports multiple IDs)
 bd show <id> [<id>...] --json
+
+# Show all available fields (extended metadata, agent identity, gate fields, etc.)
+bd show <id> --long
 ```
 
 ### Comments
